---
title: "Uber Price Elasticity via Exogenous Shock"
subtitle: "Using congestion pricing policy as exogenous shock to estimate causal price elasticity of rideshare demand under policy conditions"
author: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
date: "March 15, 2025"
image: uber-slide1.png
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Deck
{{< pdf uber.pdf width=100% height=500 >}}

## Github
[View repository on GitHub](https://github.com/ebrahimAlhaddad/price-elasticity)
